title: Standardize proof envelope wire format with IANA content type
description: The SDK currently passes proof objects as ad-hoc JSON blobs with no schema versioning or content negotiation. Define a versioned proof envelope (`application/bolyra-proof+cbor` / `+json`) with fields: `version`, `circuitId`, `provingSystem` (groth16|plonk), `publicSignals[]`, `proof` (π_A, π_B, π_C or equivalent), and `metadata` (chain, registryAddress). Add an ABNF grammar to the IETF draft §4. This is prerequisite for any multi-implementation interop — without it, each SDK reinvents serialization.
